Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Preconditions: User logged in, product available and in stock, on product detail page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[ASSERT] verify 'Add to Cart' button is visible and enabled
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] wait for success notification to appear
[ASSERT] verify cart badge count incremented
Assertions:
[DOM] success notification message visible
[DOM] cart badge count incremented by 1
[STATE] product appears in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors after add-to-cart click
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart API requests
Failure_Signals: cart badge stuck at 0; success notification never appears; 'Add to Cart' button stays in loading state

Title: Add to Cart - From Category List
Preconditions: User logged in, category page with products visible, quick-add available on product cards
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to a category listing page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] hover over a product card
[WAIT] wait for quick-add button to appear on hover
[ACT] click quick-add (Increase quantity) button on product card
[WAIT] wait for cart badge to update
Assertions:
[DOM] cart badge incremented without page navigation
[DOM] no redirect to product detail page
[STATE] product appears in cart mini-cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart update requests
Failure_Signals: page redirects to PDP unexpectedly; cart badge does not update; quick-add button not visible on hover

Title: Add to Cart - Multiple Quantities
Preconditions: User logged in, product detail page loaded, quantity selector available
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click quantity spinbutton field
[ACT] clear field and type '5'
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] wait for success notification
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify line item quantity shows 5
Assertions:
[DOM] line item quantity = 5
[MATH] line total = unit price × 5 (2 decimal places)
[STATE] cart subtotal includes full line total
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: quantity reverts to 1 after add; line total shows unit price only; cart page shows wrong quantity

Title: Add to Cart - Product Variation
Preconditions: User logged in, configurable product with size and color variants available
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to configurable product PDP on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] select size option 'Medium'
[ACT] select color option 'Blue'
[WAIT] wait for price and SKU to update for selected variant
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] wait for success notification
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify variant attributes displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] cart line item shows size: Medium and color: Blue
[STATE] correct variant SKU in cart line (not parent SKU)
[DOM] price in cart matches variant price shown on PDP
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: wrong variant added to cart; parent SKU shown instead of variant; option selections reset after add

Title: View Cart - Display Items
Preconditions: Products added to cart, user logged in
Steps:
[ACT] click cart icon in site header
[WAIT] wait for mini cart overlay to appear
[ASSERT] verify mini cart shows item names and prices
[ACT] click 'View Cart'
[WAIT] wait for full cart page to load at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all cart items displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] mini cart overlay visible with at least one item
[DOM] full cart page shows product images, names, unit prices, quantities, line totals
[NAV] URL is {{FRONT_URL}}/cart after clicking 'View Cart'
[FORMAT] prices formatted to 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on cart page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart data fetch
Failure_Signals: mini cart does not open; items missing from full cart page; images broken; prices show $0.00 or NaN

Title: Update Quantity - Increase
Preconditions: Product in cart with qty=1, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) button on line item
[WAIT] wait for quantity to update and totals to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify quantity incremented to 2
Assertions:
[DOM] line item quantity shows 2
[MATH] line total = unit price × 2 (2 decimal places)
[MATH] cart subtotal = sum of all updated line totals
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: quantity does not increment; line total stays at unit price; subtotal not recalculated
Cleanup: Restore item quantity to 1 or remove item

Title: Update Quantity - Decrease
Preconditions: Product in cart with qty > 1 (e.g., qty=2), user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click '-' (Decrease quantity) button on line item
[WAIT] wait for quantity to update and totals to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify quantity decremented to 1
[ASSERT] verify '-' (Decrease quantity) is disabled when qty=1
Assertions:
[DOM] line item quantity shows 1
[DOM] '-' (Decrease quantity) button is disabled at qty=1
[MATH] line total = unit price × 1 (2 decimal places)
[MATH] cart subtotal recalculated
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: quantity goes below 1; '-' button active at qty=1; totals not recalculated

Title: Update Quantity - Direct Input
Preconditions: Product in cart, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click the quantity spinbutton field for a line item
[KEY] Ctrl+A to select all
[ACT] type '10'
[KEY] press Tab to commit input
[WAIT] wait for cart to update
[ASSERT] verify quantity shows 10
[ASSERT] verify line total updated
Assertions:
[DOM] spinbutton shows '10'
[MATH] line total = unit price × 10 (2 decimal places)
[MATH] cart subtotal recalculated
[STATE] quantity validated against available stock
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: input reverts to previous value; line total not updated; no API call triggered on Tab
Cleanup: Restore item quantity or remove item

Title: Remove Item - Single Product
Preconditions: Product in cart, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Remove from cart' (X) button on line item
[WAIT] wait for confirmation dialog if shown
[ACT] confirm removal if dialog appears
[WAIT] wait for item to be removed
[ASSERT] verify item no longer in cart
Assertions:
[DOM] removed item no longer listed on cart page
[STATE] cart badge count decremented
[MATH] cart totals updated to exclude removed item
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] removeCartItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: item remains in cart after remove click; cart count does not decrement; totals unchanged

Title: Remove Item - Last Item
Preconditions: Only one item in cart, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Remove from cart' (X) button on the only item
[WAIT] wait for item removal and empty cart state to render
[ASSERT] verify empty cart state displayed
[ASSERT] verify continue shopping link visible
Assertions:
[DOM] empty cart message displayed
[DOM] 'Continue Shopping' or similar link visible
[STATE] cart badge shows 0
[NAV] URL remains {{FRONT_URL}}/cart or redirects gracefully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] removeCartItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: page errors after last item removal; empty state not shown; cart badge still shows 1

Title: Clear Cart - All Items
Preconditions: Multiple items in cart, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Clear Cart' button
[WAIT] wait for confirmation dialog to appear
[ACT] confirm action in dialog
[WAIT] wait for all items to be removed
[ASSERT] verify cart is empty
Assertions:
[DOM] confirmation dialog appeared before clearing
[DOM] empty cart state shown after confirmation
[STATE] cart badge shows 0
[STATE] all line items removed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] each removeCartItem mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: confirmation dialog skipped; items remain after clear; cart badge not reset; GA4 clear_cart event not fired

Title: Save for Later - Move Item
Preconditions: Product in cart, user logged in on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Save for Later' on a line item
[WAIT] wait for item to move to saved-for-later section
[ASSERT] verify item appears in saved list
[ASSERT] verify item removed from active cart section
Assertions:
[DOM] item visible in saved-for-later section
[DOM] item no longer in active cart line items
[MATH] cart subtotal excludes saved item
[STATE] cart badge decremented
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] moveItemToSaved or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: item stays in cart instead of moving; saved-for-later section not shown; subtotal not updated
Cleanup: Move item back to cart or remove

Title: Save for Later - Move Back
Preconditions: Item in saved-for-later list, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Move to Cart' on an item in the saved-for-later section
[WAIT] wait for item to appear in active cart
[ASSERT] verify item in active cart
[ASSERT] verify item removed from saved list
Assertions:
[DOM] item listed in active cart line items
[DOM] item no longer in saved-for-later section
[MATH] cart subtotal includes moved item
[STATE] cart badge incremented
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] moveItemToCart or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: item stays in saved list; active cart not updated; subtotal unchanged; badge not incremented

Title: Apply Coupon - Valid Code
Preconditions: User logged in, valid coupon code exists in system, eligible items in cart
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] locate coupon/promo code input field
[ACT] type valid coupon code
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] wait for discount to be applied
[ASSERT] verify discount line appears in order summary
Assertions:
[DOM] coupon accepted confirmation or discount line visible
[MATH] cart total = subtotal - discount amount (2 decimal places)
[DOM] discount amount shown in order summary
[STATE] coupon code displayed in cart summary
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] applyCoupon or addOrUpdateCoupon mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: apply button spins indefinitely; no discount shown; error message for valid code; total not reduced
Cleanup: Remove coupon and items from cart

Title: Apply Coupon - Invalid Code
Preconditions: User logged in, items in cart
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] locate coupon input field
[ACT] type 'FAKECODE'
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] wait for error response
[ASSERT] verify error message displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] error message visible (e.g. 'Invalid coupon code' or similar)
[STATE] no discount applied to cart
[MATH] cart total unchanged after invalid coupon attempt
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] applyCoupon mutation returns error message in response (not in errors[])
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx (API-level error is expected, not HTTP 4xx)
Failure_Signals: no error shown for fake code; discount incorrectly applied; cart total changes

Title: Cart Calculations - Subtotal
Preconditions: Multiple items in cart with different quantities, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] record unit price and quantity for each line item
[ASSERT] calculate expected subtotal: sum of (unit price × qty) for all lines
[ASSERT] compare expected subtotal to displayed subtotal
[ACT] change one item quantity
[WAIT] wait for totals to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify subtotal updated correctly
Assertions:
[MATH] each line total = unit price × quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] displayed subtotal = sum of all line totals (2 decimal places)
[MATH] subtotal updates immediately after quantity change
[FORMAT] all amounts formatted as currency with 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart recalculation requests
Failure_Signals: subtotal does not match sum of line totals; rounding error > $0.01; subtotal not updating after quantity change

Title: Cart Calculations - Tax
Preconditions: Taxable items in cart, tax configured for shipping address, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify tax line item displayed in order summary
[ASSERT] verify tax rate or amount shown
[ASSERT] verify total = subtotal + tax (+ shipping)
Assertions:
[DOM] tax line visible in order summary
[FORMAT] tax amount displayed to 2 decimal places
[MATH] total = subtotal + tax + shipping (2 decimal places)
[STATE] tax calculation based on shipping address
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on tax calculation requests
Failure_Signals: tax line missing from order summary; tax = $0.00 for taxable items; total does not include tax

Title: Cart Calculations - Shipping
Preconditions: Items in cart, shipping methods configured, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] select a shipping method if multiple options available
[WAIT] wait for shipping cost to display
[ASSERT] verify shipping cost matches selected method
[ASSERT] verify shipping cost included in order total
Assertions:
[DOM] shipping cost line visible in order summary
[MATH] order total = subtotal + tax + shipping (2 decimal places)
[STATE] selected shipping method name displayed with cost
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on shipping rate requests
Failure_Signals: shipping line missing; shipping cost $0.00 for paid methods; total does not include shipping

Title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign In
Preconditions: User has an account, at least one product available, note: search index may lag 30-60s after any price/stock changes
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and log in
[ACT] add two or more products to the cart
[ASSERT] note cart contents: product names, quantities, line totals
[ACT] click sign out
[WAIT] wait for signed-out state confirmed
[ACT] sign back in with same credentials
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] compare cart contents to noted items
Assertions:
[STATE] cart contains same items after sign out/in cycle
[DOM] quantities match pre-sign-out values
[MATH] cart subtotal matches pre-sign-out subtotal
[STATE] no duplicate or missing items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart restore
Failure_Signals: cart empty after re-login; items duplicated after merge; quantities wrong; subtotal mismatch

Title: Cart Persistence - Price Updates While Signed Out
Preconditions: User has account, admin access available, product in cart; allow 30-60s search index lag after admin price change
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] add product to cart
[ASSERT] note current displayed price
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] navigate to Catalog > Products, find product, update price, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} with user account
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify price reflects admin update
Assertions:
[STATE] cart contains product after re-login
[DOM] unit price shows updated price (not stale cached value)
[MATH] line total and subtotal reflect new price
[FORMAT] price formatted to 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify price change saved in admin
[API] getCart query returns updated price
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: cart shows old stale price after re-login; price update not reflected even after wait; subtotal mismatch
Cleanup: Restore product price in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Persistence - Cross-Device (Cross-Session)
Preconditions: User has account; two separate browser sessions available (e.g., different browser profile or incognito after login)
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} in Browser Session A
[ACT] add two or more products to cart in Session A
[WAIT] wait for cart to sync server-side
[NAV] open Browser Session B (separate browser or profile)
[ACT] log in with same account in Session B
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart in Session B
[ASSERT] verify Session B cart matches Session A
Assertions:
[STATE] Session B cart contains items added in Session A
[DOM] quantities and selected variants match
[MATH] cart subtotal identical across sessions
[STATE] cart synchronized via server-side account, not just localStorage
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query in Session B returns same items
[CONSOLE] no JS errors in either session
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: Session B shows empty cart; items differ between sessions; qty mismatch; cart loaded from stale local state

Title: Cart Persistence - Guest Cart Merge on Sign In
Preconditions: Store allows guest shopping; user has registered account with existing cart items; user currently signed out
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} without signing in (guest session)
[ACT] add one or more products to cart as guest
[ASSERT] verify guest cart shows added items
[ACT] navigate to sign in and log in with registered account
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify guest items merged with account cart
[ASSERT] verify no items dropped from either source
Assertions:
[STATE] all guest cart items present in merged cart
[STATE] pre-existing account cart items retained
[DOM] no duplicate line items for same SKU
[MATH] cart subtotal reflects all merged items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sign-in and cart page
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: guest items silently dropped on login; account items overwritten by guest cart; duplicate line items created; subtotal wrong

Title: Cart Validation - Out of Stock After Add
Preconditions: Product is in cart; admin access to change inventory; allow 30-60s search index lag after inventory change
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart and verify it shows as in-stock
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] navigate to product inventory settings, set inventory to 0, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh page
[ASSERT] verify out-of-stock item flagged in cart
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout is blocked
Assertions:
[DOM] out-of-stock item visually flagged (e.g., 'Out of Stock' badge or warning)
[STATE] 'Proceed to Checkout' button disabled or shows blocking error
[DOM] option to remove unavailable item present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify inventory set to 0 in admin
[API] getCart query reflects out-of-stock status
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no indication of out-of-stock on cart page; checkout allowed with out-of-stock item; no option to remove
Cleanup: Restore inventory in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Price Change After Add
Preconditions: Product in cart; admin access to change pricing; allow 30-60s search index lag after price update
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart and note the displayed unit price
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] update product price to higher value and save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh page
[ASSERT] verify line item price updated
Assertions:
[DOM] unit price reflects updated value
[MATH] line total = new unit price × quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] cart subtotal recalculated with new price
[STATE] no stale cached price shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify price change saved in admin
[API] getCart query returns updated price
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: old price shown after refresh; line total not recalculated; subtotal mismatch with new price
Cleanup: Restore product price in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Product Unpublished After Add
Preconditions: Product in cart; admin access to unpublish product; allow 30-60s search index lag
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] find product in catalog, unpublish/deactivate it, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh page
[ASSERT] verify product shown as unavailable
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked
Assertions:
[DOM] unavailable item shows 'This item is no longer available' or similar message
[STATE] checkout blocked until unavailable item removed
[DOM] option to remove unavailable item visible
[STATE] removing item unblocks checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify product set to unpublished/inactive in admin
[API] getCart query reflects unavailable status
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: unavailable item shown as purchasable; checkout allowed with unpublished product; no prompt to remove
Cleanup: Republish product in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
Preconditions: Product in cart with qty=1; product has limited stock (e.g., 5 units); inventory tracking enabled
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) or use direct input to set qty exceeding stock (e.g., type 10 when max 5)
[WAIT] wait for validation response
[ASSERT] verify validation error or auto-cap applied
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked if qty still exceeds stock
Assertions:
[DOM] warning message displayed indicating qty exceeds available stock
[STATE] quantity auto-corrected to max available OR checkout blocked with error
[DOM] max available quantity stated in error message
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns stock validation error or errors[] reflects constraint
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no validation shown for over-stock qty; checkout proceeds with qty > stock; no indication of stock limit
Cleanup: Restore item quantity to valid amount

Title: Cart Validation - Mixed Valid and Invalid Items
Preconditions: Multiple products in cart; admin access; allow 30-60s search index lag after admin changes
Steps:
[ACT] add three or more products to cart
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] set one product inventory to 0 (out of stock)
[ACT] unpublish a second product
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and refresh
[ASSERT] verify valid items unaffected, invalid items flagged
[ACT] remove all invalid items
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout proceeds
Assertions:
[DOM] valid items displayed with correct prices and quantities
[DOM] out-of-stock item individually flagged
[DOM] unpublished item individually flagged with separate message
[STATE] checkout blocked while invalid items present
[STATE] checkout proceeds after all invalid items removed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify both admin changes saved
[API] getCart query returns per-item status flags
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: valid items affected by invalid item flags; all items show same error; checkout proceeds with invalid items; individual item messages missing
Cleanup: Restore inventory and republish products in admin; remove items from cart

Title: Price Increase During Session
Preconditions: User logged in; product added to cart at original price; admin access available; allow 30-60s search index lag
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart and note price (e.g., $10.00) and subtotal
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] navigate to Catalog > Products, find product, increase price to $15.00, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart (without clearing cache)
[ACT] reload cart page (F5 or refresh)
[ASSERT] verify unit price and subtotal updated
Assertions:
[DOM] unit price shows $15.00 (not $10.00)
[MATH] line total = $15.00 × quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] subtotal recalculated at new price
[STATE] no mismatch between cart price and checkout price
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify price saved as $15.00 in admin
[API] getCart query returns updated price
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: old $10.00 price persists after refresh; subtotal shows stale value; price mismatch between cart and checkout
Cleanup: Restore original price in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Price Decrease During Session
Preconditions: User logged in; product added to cart at original price; admin access available; allow 30-60s search index lag
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart and note price (e.g., $20.00)
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] decrease product price to $15.00 and save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] reload cart page
[ASSERT] verify price decreased
Assertions:
[DOM] unit price shows $15.00 (not $20.00)
[MATH] line total = $15.00 × quantity (2 decimal places)
[MATH] subtotal recalculated at lower price
[STATE] customer benefits from lower price — no residual old price shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify price saved as $15.00 in admin
[API] getCart query returns updated lower price
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: old $20.00 price shown after refresh; line total not recalculated; checkout still charges old price
Cleanup: Restore original price in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Discount Removal During Session
Preconditions: User logged in; product in cart with active promotional discount applied; admin access available; allow 30-60s search index lag
Steps:
[ACT] add discounted product to cart and note discounted price
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] deactivate or remove the promotion/coupon, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] reload cart page
[ASSERT] verify discount removed and full price shown
Assertions:
[DOM] unit price shows full price (discount removed)
[STATE] discount line removed from order summary
[MATH] cart total recalculates to full price
[STATE] no stale discount amount persists
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify promotion deactivated in admin
[API] getCart query reflects full price without discount
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: stale discount persists after promo deactivation; discount line still shown in summary; total still shows reduced amount
Cleanup: Restore promotion in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Quantity Stepper - PDP Increment Adds to Cart Immediately
Preconditions: User logged in, product available, product NOT currently in cart
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[ASSERT] verify spinbutton 'Product quantity' shows '0' and 'Decrease quantity' button is disabled
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) button
[WAIT] wait for API call to complete and UI to update
[ASSERT] verify spinbutton shows '1'
[ASSERT] verify 'in Cart' indicator appears showing '1'
[ASSERT] verify Cart badge incremented by 1
[ASSERT] verify 'Decrease quantity' button becomes enabled
Assertions:
[DOM] spinbutton value = '1' after click
[DOM] 'in Cart' indicator visible adjacent to stepper
[STATE] cart badge incremented (no separate Add to Cart button required)
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' button transitioned from disabled to enabled
Cross_Layer_Checks:
